chief_complaint: A 51-year-old woman presents with a history of chronic pancreatitis and recent development of pancreatic ductal adenocarcinoma.
history: The patient has a history of PRSS1-associated hereditary pancreatitis, chronic alcohol and tobacco use, and recent neoadjuvant chemotherapy followed by total pancreatectomy.
exam: Vital signs and physical examination findings are not provided.
labs: Histological analysis of the entire pancreas revealed no high-grade PanINs and scattered low-grade PanINs, with and without KRAS mutations. Genomic profiling identified multiple driver alterations, comprising both clonal and subclonal events.
correct_diagnosis: Pancreatic ductal adenocarcinoma in PRSS1-associated hereditary pancreatitis with chromothripsis-like tumor evolution
differentials: Pancreatic ductal adenocarcinoma in PRSS1-associated hereditary pancreatitis with chromothripsis-like tumor evolution
